- New York (state) - Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_York_(state)): # New York (state). | Flag of New York Flag  Official seal of New York.svg "Official seal of New York") Seal "Seal of New York (state)") | |. | Location of New York within the United States Location of New York within the United States | |. | Largest city | New York City |. | Largest metro "Statistical area (United States)") and urban areas | New York metropolitan area |. **New York**, also called **New York State**, is a state located in the northeastern United States. New York is the fourth-most populous state in the United States, with over 20 million residents, and the 27th-largest state by area, with a total area of 54,556 square miles (141,300Â km2). The southeastern part of the state, known as Downstate, encompasses New York City, the most populous city in the United States; Long Island, with approximately 40% of the state's population, the nation's most populous island; and the cities, suburbs, and wealthy enclaves of the lower Hudson Valley.
